item.text: New plan or a review of an existing plan?

answer.valueString: Controlled diabetes - aim HbA1c ≤7.0 and fasting BGL 4.0-7.0
Aim for 150 mins moderate physical activity per week
Aim for 5-10% weight loss, waist circumference <80cm
Consider Home Medicines Review in 3-6 months

Reduce ratio of carbohydrates in each meal – ¼ plate carbs, ¼ plate protein, ½ plate vegetables/salad
Substitute high GI for low GI carbohydrates where possible
Aim for 150 mins of aerobic activity per week

Manage impulsivity/desire to eat when not actually hungry. Consider psychology input in future
